notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz steals (1) 2nd base. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Freddy Fermin.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Brandon Lowe to 3rd. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Brandon Lowe to 3rd. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ramón Laureano GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Laureano grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Jake Cronenworth out at 2nd. Ramón Laureano out at 1st.
